title: geranium pratense var. transbaicalicum
intro: Geranium pratense var. transbaicalicum, also known as the Transbaikal cranesbill, is a variety of the meadow geranium plant native to the Transbaikal region in Russia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it a popular choice in traditional herbal remedies. The health benefits of this plant include reducing pain and inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Geranium pratense var. transbaicalicum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy balance of bodily functions.
